title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 167.617 - Continuation of services previously provided
text:
167.617.  Continuation of services previously provided. — Nothing in sections 167.600 to 167.621 shall prohibit schools or school districts from continuing health or medical services which were provided by such schools or school districts prior to August 28, 1993.
(L. 1993 H.B. 564 § 7)
